refsynopsisdiv.title: Calling Sequence
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: csv_write(M, filename[, separator[, decimal[, format[, comments]]]])

listitem.para: a character string. The file path.
a matrix of strings or double (complex supported).
column separator mark, by default a tabulation: "," or [] to use current defaut value.
decimal mark '.' or ',' by default a '.' or [] to use current default value.

a character string giving the format. This is an optional parameter, the default value is "%.16lg". supported format: %[width].[precision]type or %type width: Optional number that specifies the minimum number of characters output. precision: Optional number that specifies the maximum number of characters printed for all or part of the output field, or the minimum number of digits printed for integer values. type: lf, lg, d, i, e, f, g
a string matrix giving non numerical comments stored at the beginning of the file.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: csv_write(M, filename) writes matrix M into filename as comma-separated values. The filename input is a string.
if the file 'filename' already exists, it is overwritten.

refsection.title: Examples
